_comment: Mutation testing scoped to the DOM-free, harness-exercised core modules (crisis/wars cost + sampler war-civ identity). The command runner re-runs the full Node harness suite per mutant; coverageAnalysis is off because the command runner has no per-test hooks. The ESM loader (tests/loader.mjs) anchors /demographics/ to its own location, so Stryker's sandbox copy resolves to the mutated sandbox files - no inPlace needed.
